Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label

Class LoopBodyTermLabelUpdate

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label.LoopBodyTermLabelUpdate
All Implemented Interfaces:
RuleSpecificTask, TermLabelUpdate
public class LoopBodyTermLabelUpdate extends Object implements TermLabelUpdate
Makes sure that SymbolicExecutionUtil.LOOP_BODY_LABEL is introduced when a WhileInvariantRule is applied.

    getSupportedRuleNames()
    Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.

    This method can freely add, remove or sort the given TermLabel which will be added to the new Term.

  • Method Details

    • getSupportedRuleNames

      public ImmutableList<Name> getSupportedRuleNames()
      Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.
      Specified by:
      getSupportedRuleNames in interface RuleSpecificTask
      Returns:
      The list of supported rule Names or null/empty list if all rules are supported.

    • updateLabels

      public void updateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Term applicationTerm, Term modalityTerm, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Object hint, Term tacletTerm, Term newTerm, Set<TermLabel> labels)
      This method can freely add, remove or sort the given TermLabel which will be added to the new Term.
      Specified by:
      updateLabels in interface TermLabelUpdate
      Parameters:
      state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application. return true keep TermLabel and add it to the new Term. false drop TermLabel and do not need it to the new Term.
      services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
      applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the Term that is rewritten.
      applicationTerm - The Term defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
      modalityTerm - The optional modality Term.
      rule - The Rule which is applied.
      ruleApp - The RuleApp which is currently performed.
      hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
      tacletTerm - The optional Term in the taclet which is responsible to instantiate the new Term for the new proof node or null in case of built in rules.
      newTerm - the template for the new Term to create
      labels - The Set of TermLabels to modify.
